services.title: Skip Hire
services.shortDescription: Ideal for home renovations, garden clearances and general waste removal. Fast delivery and collection with permits arranged where needed.

hero.title: Skip Hire
hero.subtitle: Simple, cost-effective skip hire for domestic and commercial projects across the UK.

content.intro: Choose from a full range of skip sizes for any project — from small garden clear-outs to major construction works. We deliver, exchange and collect on your schedule, and we arrange road permits where required.

options.name: 4 Yard Skip
options.description: Small garden and household clearances. ~40 bin bags.

options.name: 6 Yard Skip
options.description: Renovations and medium clearances. ~60 bin bags.

options.name: 8 Yard Skip
options.description: Our most popular size for building works. ~80 bin bags.

options.name: 12 Yard Skip
options.description: Bulky, lightweight commercial waste. ~110 bin bags.

services.title: Cage Van Hire
services.shortDescription: Perfect where skips aren't practical. Flexible man-and-van waste collection for clearances, bulky waste and restricted-access sites.

hero.title: Cage Van Hire
hero.subtitle: Flexible man-and-van waste collection — we load it, we take it away.

content.intro: When a skip isn't practical, our cage van service is the perfect alternative. Our team arrives, loads your waste and removes it the same day — no permit and no waiting around.
features: Pay only for the space you use

options.name: Quarter Load
options.description: A few items or a small clear-out.

services.title: Hazardous Waste
services.shortDescription: Safe, compliant collection and disposal of hazardous waste with full documentation and licensed handling.

hero.title: Hazardous Waste Collection
hero.subtitle: Safe, fully compliant collection and disposal of hazardous materials.

content.intro: We handle hazardous waste safely and in full compliance with UK regulations. From asbestos to chemicals, batteries and clinical waste, our licensed team manages collection, documentation and disposal end-to-end.

services.title: Demolition Services
services.shortDescription: Professional, safe demolition for residential and commercial sites, including site clearance and waste removal.

hero.title: Demolition Services
hero.subtitle: Professional and safe demolition for residential and commercial projects.

content.intro: Our experienced demolition teams handle projects of all sizes — from internal strip-outs to full structural demolition. We manage surveys, method statements, safe demolition and complete site clearance.

services.title: Portaloo Hire
services.shortDescription: Clean, well-maintained portable toilets for construction sites, events and outdoor projects with flexible hire periods.

hero.title: Portaloo Hire
hero.subtitle: Clean, reliable portable toilet hire for sites and events.

content.intro: Keep your site or event covered with our clean, well-serviced portable toilets. We offer single units and large multi-unit blocks with regular servicing included on longer hires.
